type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We have reviewed the most current NPRI reporting requirements and caught a small mistake that has been going on for several years (at least since 2007). The NPRI requirement is specific to report only the filterable portion , whereas the calculation used both the condensable and filterable portion.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: We have reviewed the most current NPRI reporting requirements and caught a small mistake that has been going on for several years (at least since 2007). The NPRI requirement is specific to report only the filterable portion , whereas the calculation used both the condensable and filterable portion.
